visual_attributes.morphology: Small, arboreal frog with a transparent or translucent abdomen.
distinctive_features: Transparent abdominal skin revealing internal organs
Translucent legs that aid in camouflage
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Compact body with limbs positioned for climbing

domain_specific_visual.TRANSPARENCY: Visible internal organs through the skin
domain_specific_visual.EDGE_DIFFUSION: Softened body outline due to translucent legs

functional_attributes.primary_function: Camouflage and concealment in rainforest foliage

relationships.description: Native habitat of the glass frog species
Family classification of the glass frog

contextual_attributes.geographic_range: Central America, Colombia, Ecuador, Venezuela, Peru
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents adaptation and camouflage in rainforest ecosystems
